expectations.text: Runs Step 0 diagnostic checks before starting setup
expectations.evidence: Step 0 runs 4 checks: node_modules, .env, ports, .pnpm directory

expectations.text: Detects npm vs pnpm mismatch and explains why pnpm is needed
expectations.evidence: Diagnosis: 'Package manager mismatch: You mentioned npm install — this project uses pnpm workspaces... No worries, this is a common mix-up!'
Step 1: runs 'pnpm install' after explaining why

expectations.text: Asks user for their Anthropic API key
expectations.evidence: Step 2: uses AskUserQuestion with console URL

expectations.text: Does not echo API key to terminal output
expectations.evidence: Step 2: uses Edit tool, explicitly notes 'NOT echoing it to the terminal'

expectations.text: Presents both localhost:3000 and localhost:5173 URLs
Follows correct order: diagnostic -> install -> env config -> start services
expectations.evidence: Steps 0-5 in correct order, diagnostic explicitly first

expectations.text: Acknowledges user already attempted install, doesn't ignore their context
expectations.evidence: Diagnosis says 'I can see what's going on' and explicitly addresses both npm mismatch and missing .env as two separate findings
